name: Baked Pork Chops Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Trim pork chops if necessary.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. In a large skillet over medium heat, brown the chops.
5. Spread the bottom of a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish with rice.
6. Top the rice with the browned chops.
7. On each chop, arrange a green bell pepper ring (1/2-inch thick) with a heaping teaspoon of chili sauce in the center.
8. Into the drippings in the skillet, pour 2 1/2 cups water.
9. Stir in the onion soup mix. Bring to a boil.
10. Pour into the corner of the baking dish.
11. Bake, covered, for 1 hour or until chops and rice are tender.
